scholarships.name: Outstanding International Student Award
scholarships.description: Recognizes strong academic performance and extracurricular contribution.

scholarships.name: Beyond Tomorrow Scholars Program
scholarships.description: Supports students who have overcome significant adversity and bring diverse experiences.

deadlines.description: Earlier deadline often applies for major entrance awards.

extracurricularPreferences: Thoughtful leadership and service in the Personal Profile
Project, research or innovation evidence for STEM
Authentic extracurricular reflection rather than title collecting

boardNotes.CBSE: CBSE applicants are commonly admitted; universities usually review Grade XI and XII marks with emphasis on prerequisite subjects.
boardNotes.ICSE: ISC results are recognized and competitive when supported by strong English and math/science performance.
boardNotes.State Board: State board students are eligible, though some programs prefer higher marks or supplemental context on grading rigor.
boardNotes.IB: IB Diploma with 34-40 points is competitive for selective programs and may earn transfer credit or advanced standing.
boardNotes.Cambridge: A-level qualifications are accepted directly; prerequisite subjects and predicted grades matter for selective entry.

ranking: One of Canada’s top public research universities

name: ETH Zurich

admissionRequirements.internationalStudentNotes: Most bachelor programs are taught primarily in German; international students should confirm Swiss recognition rules and language eligibility early.

scholarships.name: ETH Foundation Scholarship Support
scholarships.description: Foundation-linked support may be available for students with financial hardship.

scholarships.name: Swiss Study Foundation Support
scholarships.description: External merit-based support route for exceptionally strong academic profiles.

scholarships.name: Solidarity Fund Assistance
scholarships.description: Targeted help for students facing hardship or significant barriers.

deadlines.description: Timing varies by applicant category and qualification type.

extracurricularPreferences: Olympiads, problem-solving contests and research rigor
Independent technical work with strong fundamentals
Academic excellence matters far more than broad extracurricular volume

boardNotes.CBSE: Indian board applicants should confirm Swiss recognition rules; ETH often expects very high Class XII marks plus additional recognized qualifications where required.
boardNotes.ICSE: ISC is reviewed against Swiss equivalency standards; mathematics and science depth are critical for direct admission to STEM.
boardNotes.State Board: State board applicants may need supplementary qualifications because Swiss recognition can be stricter for non-standardized boards.
boardNotes.IB: IB Diploma with strong HL Mathematics and sciences is one of the cleaner international routes for eligibility.
boardNotes.Cambridge: Cambridge A-levels in Mathematics and sciences are well aligned with ETH prerequisites; German-language requirements still apply for most bachelor programs.

ranking: Regularly ranked among the top continental European universities for STEM
